title: Formation Constants of the Chelates of 2-Hydroxy-1-Naphthalidene-ortho-Fluoroaniline with Some Bivalent Metal Ions
author: M. S. MAYADBO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 26 March 1979, revised 18 February 1982, accepted 23 May 1982  

 Potentiometric studies on metal chelates of Cu 2 , Ni 2 , Co 2 , Zo 2  and UO \(_2^2\)  +  with 2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene- ortho -fluoroaniline have been carried out. The forma­tion constant,  .pK 1 ,  of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal chelates have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25 \(_-^+\) 0.1° and at ionic strength 0.1  M  in 75 : 25 percent  (v/v)  dioxane-water medium. The order of stability of metal chelates is found to be UO \(_2^2\)  +  > Cu 2+  > Zn 2+  > Co 2+  > Ni 2+ .
steps_raw:
Department of Chemistry, Ramnarain Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019 

  Manuscript received 26 March 1979, revised 18 February 1982, accepted 23 May 1982  

 Potentiometric studies on metal chelates of Cu 2 , Ni 2 , Co 2 , Zo 2  and UO \(_2^2\)  +  with 2-hydroxy-1-naphthalidene- ortho -fluoroaniline have been carried out. The forma­tion constant,  .pK 1 ,  of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal chelates have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25 \(_-^+\) 0.1° and at ionic strength 0.1  M  in 75 : 25 percent  (v/v)  dioxane-water medium. The order of stability of metal chelates is found to be UO \(_2^2\)  +  > Cu 2+  > Zn 2+  > Co 2+  > Ni 2+ .
